ValidationRule.description: When Issue ='Account transfer' then the Future account owner should have their manager
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Setup.ShGl_DisableBusinessLogic__c.Disable_Operation_Request_VRs__c), ISPICKVAL( Issue__c , 'Account Transfer') , NOT(ISBLANK(Future_account_owner__c )) , NOT(ISBLANK(Current_account_owner__c )) , ISBLANK( Future_account_owner__r.ManagerId) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This Future account owner's manager doesn't exist, You can't create an Admin queue with this Future account owner.
